title: Luscious Norwegian Wagyu Bowl
description: A fatty, bouncy-qq hangover cure featuring seared wagyu, steamed papillote, and a bright dill‑lemon rice base.
instructions: Rinse and pat dry the wagyu steak; season both sides with sea salt, pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Heat a heavy skillet over high heat; sear the steak for 2–3 minutes per side for medium rare, then remove and let rest.
While the steak rests, cook brown rice following package instructions; fluff and set aside.
In a parchment square, arrange the seared steak, drizzle remaining olive oil, sprinkle dill, lemon juice, soy sauce, and sesame seeds; fold into a tight papillote.
Steam the papillote in a pot with a tight-fitting lid for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Slice the steak into strips once the parchment opens, releasing steam carefully to avoid burns.
Toss the cooked rice with sliced green onions, a splash of soy sauce, and a pinch of sea salt; then top with steak strips.
Serve immediately, garnishing with extra dill and a wedge of lemon for an extra zing that helps soothe a hangover.
